manipulators.description: Visual Mode: Press gg to extend selection to first or Grid column top
Visual Mode: Press G to extend selection to last or Grid column bottom
Normal Mode: Press gg for List first or Grid column top
Normal Mode: Press G for List last or Grid column bottom
Normal/Visual Mode: Start gg sequence
Normal Mode: Press cc to copy absolute paths
Normal Mode: Press cd to copy containing directory paths
Normal Mode: Press cf to copy names with extensions
Normal Mode: Press cn to copy names without extensions
Normal Mode: Start c copy sequence
Normal Mode: Press - to open the parent directory
Normal Mode: Press o to open the selected item
Normal Mode: Press i to show Get Info
Normal Mode: Press n to create a new folder
Normal Mode: Press . to toggle hidden files
Normal/Visual Mode: Add 1 to Finder motion count
Normal/Visual Mode: Add 2 to Finder motion count
Normal/Visual Mode: Add 3 to Finder motion count
Normal/Visual Mode: Add 4 to Finder motion count
Normal/Visual Mode: Add 5 to Finder motion count
Normal/Visual Mode: Add 6 to Finder motion count
Normal/Visual Mode: Add 7 to Finder motion count
Normal/Visual Mode: Add 8 to Finder motion count
Normal/Visual Mode: Add 9 to Finder motion count
Normal/Visual Mode: Add 0 to Finder motion count
Visual Mode: Extend selection down by Finder motion count
Normal Mode: Move down by Finder motion count
Visual Mode: Extend selection up by Finder motion count
Normal Mode: Move up by Finder motion count
Normal Mode: Map h to reverse Grid row wrap with transient C worker
Experimental List native hold: Map j directly to Down Arrow
Experimental List native hold: Map k directly to Up Arrow
Normal Mode: Map j to List wrap or Grid down with transient C worker
Normal Mode: Map k to List wrap or Grid up with transient C worker
Normal Mode: Map l to forward Grid row wrap with transient C worker
Normal Mode -> Visual Mode: Press v to start range selection
Normal Mode: Press r to rename
Normal Mode: Press Esc to clear discontiguous Finder marks
Visual Mode: Extend selection left with h
Visual Mode: Extend selection down with j
Visual Mode: Extend selection up with k
Visual Mode: Extend selection right with l
Visual Mode: Copy selection with y and return to Normal Mode
Visual Mode: Mark selection for move with x and return to Normal Mode
Visual Mode: Move selection to Trash with d and return to Normal Mode
Visual Mode: Press Esc to leave Visual Mode and clear selection
Normal Mode: Toggle discontiguous Finder mark with s
Normal Mode: Copy confirmed marks, or selection when no marks exist, with y
Normal Mode: Cut confirmed marks, or selection when no marks exist, with x
Normal Mode: Trash confirmed marks, or selection when no marks exist, with d
Normal Mode: Move-paste Finder items with p after x
Normal Mode: Copy-paste Finer items with p after y
Normal Mode: Paste Finder items with p
Normal Mode: Press / to trigger Cmd+F (Search)
